Here is the complete picture of the current voice architecture and what needs to change.

## Current Voice Pipeline

### Speech-to-Text (Transcription)

**File:** `/home/clungus/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/claude-plugins-official/external_plugins/discord/voice-receive.ts`

The pipeline is:
1. Bot subscribes to user audio streams in Discord voice channel (Opus packets at 48kHz stereo)
2. Decodes Opus to PCM using `@discordjs/opus`
3. Downsamples from 48kHz stereo to 16kHz mono in TypeScript...(truncated)
